subject: fix(ui): fix cell highlighting, image indicators, text redistribution, and default layout
body:
Cell highlighting in Structure tab showed stale ring on wrong cell after switching
layout types because globalSelectedCell wasn't clamped to the new cell count. Image
indicators in MiniCellGrid used preset designations (imageCells array) instead of
actual assignments (cellImages object), causing inconsistency with ContextBar.
Text redistribution in applyLayoutPreset ran cleanup first which deleted text from
orphaned cells before it could be collected and redistributed. Default layout changed
from quad-grid (4 cells) to split-horizontal (2 rows) for simpler first-time experience.

Tags: ui, state, layout, text
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-highlighting
Semver: patch
